title: Space Explore
description: This mod allows you to explore an entire galaxy of unique planets
body:
This mod allows you to explore procedurally generated planets in a single galaxy.

**How to use:**
- To start, simply **press the O key** on your keyboard and a space map will open.
- Use the mouse wheel to zoom in on stars and planets.
- Click on the planet you want to visit and you will be teleported there.

**Important:**
I only used MCreator for the mod's base; all scripts were written by me.
The mod is in a very early beta stage, so there isn't much survival content yet.
The mod also doesn't work in multiplayer, but this will be fixed in future updates.
